fields.description:
The payment validation in /app/modules/Payment/Validator.php is failing for empty carts.

Steps to reproduce:
1. Go to checkout with an empty cart
2. Click 'Pay Now'
3. Server returns 500 instead of validation error

The issue is in the `validateCart()` method of `Payment_Validator` class. See commit abc1234 for when this was last changed.

Related branch: feature/PROD-1234-fix-payment

Also check /app/controllers/CheckoutController.php and src/services/CartService.php

comments.body:
I can reproduce this consistently. The Platform_Array helper in /lib/Platform/Array.php might be related — it was changed in r4521.

Also noticed Application_Payment_Gateway class might need updating.

Confirmed. The root cause is in validateCart() — it doesn't handle the edge case when $items is null vs empty array.

Check the fix in commit 9f8e7d6a5b4c3d2e1f0a9b8c7d6e5f4a3b2c1d0e on branch feature/PROD-1100-cart-refactor.

We should also look at src/validators/BaseValidator.php and the Zend_Controller_Action base class.
Working on this now. Will update the Payment\Validator namespace and add null checks.
